description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric. The sofa features two large, square seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. Two brown accent throw pillows are placed symmetrically at each end, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise monochromatic palette. The armrests are straight, broad, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, cylindrical metallic legs with a shiny finish, slightly elevating it off the ground. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A modern gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, brown accent pillows, and metallic legs, featuring a clean and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, two brown pillows, and the symmetrical arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the brown pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the sofa's boxy silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest, seat depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size, with two loose brown throw pillows placed at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at seat height, rectangular profile, fully upholstered in the same gray fabric as the rest of the sofa, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical metallic legs with a shiny finish, positioned at each corner, slightly elevating the sofa off the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached cushions, no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
